response.overview: Adrianna has the hots for lonely housewife Bobbi. When the ladies meet for breakfast, Adrianna devours Bobbi and gives her the climax of her life. College-bound Charlie gets some hot tips from Jenna about campus life. Michelle is house shopping when she finds her dream home, complete with all the amenities, including a young, hot sexy redhead named Alexandra.
response.tagline: Being A Student Has Never Been So Stimulating
response.title: Lesbian Tutors 7
